compiled_state.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for github-bootstrap.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Write failing behavioral tests for the new `plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/github-bootstrap.sh` script before it is implemented (RED phase).

## Files to Create

- `tests/scripts/test-github-bootstrap.sh` — executable bash test file

## Acceptance Criteria

The test file must:
- Be executable (`chmod +x`)
- Use `tests/lib/assert.sh` patterns (_snapshot_fail / assert_eq / assert_pass_if_clean)
- Register the script in .test-index: `plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/github-bootstrap.sh:tests/scripts/test-github-bootstrap.sh`
- Include the following test cases (all RED — script does not yet exist):
  1. `test_script_exists` — assert `-f $SCRIPT && -x $SCRIPT`; will FAIL until script is created
  2. `test_gh_missing_exits_zero` — override PATH to exclude gh; run script; assert exit code 0 (fail-open pre-flight)
  3. `test_dry_run_exits_zero` — provide mocked gh and git in a temp PATH; run with `--dry-run`; assert exit code 0
  4. `test_repo_flag_parsed` — provide mocked gh; run with `--repo owner/repo --dry-run`; assert exit code 0 (no parse error)

## Mock Pattern

For tests that need gh/git, use temp directories with fake scripts:
```bash
TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
_TMP_DIRS+=("$TMP_DIR")
cat > "$TMP_DIR/gh" <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "mock-gh $*"
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x "$TMP_DIR/gh"
cat > "$TMP_DIR/git" <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "mock-git $*"
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x "$TMP_DIR/git"
PATH="$TMP_DIR:$PATH" bash "$SCRIPT" --dry-run 2>/dev/null || rc=$?
```

## Behavioral Testing Standard

Tests must check observable exit-code behavior — not script source text. Satisfy the 'refactoring litmus test': if the implementation changes internals but preserves behavior, tests must still pass.

## Testing Mode

testing_mode: RED

comments.body:
PLAN_REVIEW_CORRECTIONS:

Add these additional test cases (review found test coverage gaps):
5. test_gh_missing_emits_guide — when gh absent, stdout/stderr contains guide text (e.g. 'manual' or 'gh CLI')
6. test_push_before_ruleset — use call-order recording mocks for git and provision-ruleset.sh; verify git push is invoked before provision-ruleset.sh

PATTERN REQUIREMENT: Must use tests/lib/assert.sh with _snapshot_fail / assert_eq / assert_pass_if_clean pattern (consistent with test-provision-ruleset.sh and test-validate-required-checks.sh in this directory).
comments.author: Test
